eventSummary:
Resolv was targeted in a cyberattack involving an exploit of its USR stablecoin. Analysis indicates an attacker compromised an off-chain signer key or exploit of the service role to mint approximately 80 million USR, with at least $25 million diverted through aggregators due to a lack of on-chain validation between swap requests and minting.
Sources:
- https://t.me/okxofficial_id
- https://t.me/crvrussianchat
